session.summary: Completed Phase 9 Market Launch kit (Discord, PH/HN copy, Demo script) and Phase 10 Jira CI CLI integration (--export-jira).

previous_sessions.summary: Removed all mock data from UI components and wired up to live FastAPI endpoints for phase 3.

Started with main aligned at 554f2d16 with 6 legitimate Phase 7/8 commits. Proceeded with push-and-merge workflow. Need to push the 6 commits ahead of origin/main and complete the merge. Currently have uncommitted changes that need attention: sync files and reports/tests that need to be reviewed and committed.
Built 18 integration tests bridging evals, adversarial, and synthetic modules, verifying post-generation pipeline stages with mocked LLM and filesystem. All 100 tests pass.
